name: Orvis Corporation
summary: Orvis Corporation manufactures and sells timber products in Japan. The company is also involved in the manufacture and sale of packaging materials and prefabricated houses; leasing of temporary buildings; contracting of general buildings and solar power generation systems; generation of power using natural energy; and operation of fitness clubs and golf courses. In addition, it engages in buying, selling, and leasing real estate properties. The company was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Fukuyama, Japan.
